title: sedum adolphi
intro: Sedum adolphi, also known as Goldmoss stonecrop, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and soothing skin irritations, due to its mucilaginous and antiseptic properties. Sedum adolphi can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal use.
